Bash(git -C "D:/my-projects/evakuator725" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: footer dev font to Inter for cyrillic, remove svg opacity, fix deploy script_stop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF

Bash(git -C "D:/my-projects/evakuator725" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: replace appleboy/ssh-action with direct SSH for reliable deploy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: switch default language from Uzbek to Russian to resolve Google Ads cloaking block

Google Ads flagged the site for "cloaking" because ads are in Russian but the
site opened in Uzbek. Now the HTML source is 100% Russian by default, matching
the ad language. Users can still switch to Uzbek via the language toggle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
